conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: How do wearable fitness trackers help individuals monitor and improve their health?
org_constraint: Discuss how wearable fitness trackers provide real-time feedback, track progress over time.
new_constraint: The response must include the phrase "The response will not discuss the real-time feedback provided by wearable fitness trackers."
